{{Quote|We have developed highly sophisticated weapons of all types that will prove advantageous to anyone.... including both the Empire and the Rebellion.|A Caelli-Merced dealer|<ref name="SonyCite" />}}
The '''Caelli-Merced Syndicate''' was the manufacturer of the [[CR-43 Low-Ride Gossbey Racing Edition]] and the [[CR-43XA]]. Their organization was secretly illegal.

During the [[Battle of Restuss]], they sold various weapons to both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], with the Rebels being their preferred customers, believing the constant fighting, with little sign of it letting up, would mean a profit for them. However, one of the dealers, when attempting to make a weapons sales pitch, accidentally admitted this strategy to an undercover Imperial operative, who promptly shot him on sight after making a purchase for his treason against the Empire.<ref name="SonyCite" />
